title: Is 'super El Niño' coming? UN warns of potentially historic climate event as fossil fuel emissions push planet into danger zone
description: Planet on edge as looming El Niño threatens to turbocharge heat, floods and drought

title: Data centres in bed with big gas: Fossil fuels power the AI boom
description: AI data-centre mega-hubs as large as 350 hectares are being planned across Australia. And the energy they need to fuel them is just as huge

title: Valheim 1.0 release date announced, so prepare to ward off "ancient evils and lurking threats" in its treacherously icy final biome
description: It may, as I write this, be summer showcase season. However, you should get ready to wrap up warm. Co-op Viking survivor Valheim 's set to get very cold soon, as its 1.0 release brings a final new biome, the Deep North. "A frigid land encased in ice and mystery" this dangerous locale and Valheim 1.0 will arrive on September 9th. Read more

title: 250 original ancient objects bring Egypt to life in Victoria museum
description: Ancient Egypt: Obsessed with Life exhibit runs all year at the Royal BC Museum
